MOTION To Vacate Sister State Money Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-06-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: James A. Stearman, Esq. 714/870-8501 for pltf & opposing party (appearing via Courtcall); no other appearances.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Pltf to prepare order.

MOTION To Vacate Sister State Money Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-23-2002 Continued To Feb-06-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: James A. Stearman, Esq. 714/870-8501 for pltf & opposing party (filed opposition) (appearing via Courtcall); William W. Van Way, Esq. 788-2286 appearing specially for Arnold Chin, Esq. 788-2286 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: The Court continues the matter to 02/06/02 at 9:30am. Parties to send confirming letters with courtesy copies.
